tools.Name: Unsloth
tools.Description: A platform for training and running open models (e.g., Qwen, DeepSeek, Llama) with improved speed and lower memory usage.
tools.Use_Case: Fine-tuning LLMs on consumer hardware and deploying local models.

tools.Name: Open SWE
tools.Description: An open-source framework for building internal coding agents that can interact with repositories, Slack, and Linear.
tools.Use_Case: Building autonomous, repository-aware engineering agents for code maintenance and PR generation.

tools.Name: MaxKB
tools.Description: An open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines.
tools.Use_Case: Creating smart customer service bots and corporate internal knowledge base assistants.
